data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. MISS BOBBIE ran below best last time finishing fourth (23.06) over 390m at this track in a T3 Grade 7. Tough to beat if on-song. 6. GRUMPY LION has been in the frame at his last two runs, most recently when second (22.79) in a T3 Grade 7 over 390m at this track. Can hit the frame this time. 7. FEDERAL FRECKLE finds it hard to break through. Finished third (18.71) at Wagga latest and might be close to finding winning form again. The form from his last run stacks up well. Expected to feature again. 1. MISS BARBIE is likely to have admirers.","runners":[3,6,7,1],"exclusive":false}
